chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 1935 of 2017 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 22.01.2018 For orders on office objection For katcha peshi None present for petitioner Mr. Ghulam Abbass Sangi, Asstt: A.G. along with SIP Hashim Brohi SHO Ghora Bari district Thatta Learned Addl. A.G. has filed comments of respondent Nos. 2, 3 & 8 though learned Asstt: A.G. which are taken on record. The petitioner is not present today; however, I have noted from the prayer clause of the petition and order dated 2.1.2018 whereby that the petitioners have sought legal protection. Learned A.A.G. is present and states that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law and shall provide the same protection to the petitioners as is available to other citizen of country. In view of statement of learned A.A.G. the present petition is disposed of. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
